ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT TROTTER, ARNESHA FKA ARNESHA GARNER

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ARNESHA FKA ARNESHA TROTTER'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. ARNESHA FKA ARNESHA TROTTER HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: DAVID L. BALLATI; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR #4280 (D206)
